# Website Redesign - RetailCorp

Successfully delivered a complete e-commerce website redesign.

## Client
RetailCorp - A mid-size retail company with 200+ stores.

## Challenge
Their existing website was built in 2018 and had poor mobile experience,
slow load times, and an outdated checkout flow.

## Solution
- Complete redesign with mobile-first approach
- Next.js for improved performance
- Headless CMS for content management
- Stripe integration for payments

## Results
- 45% increase in mobile conversions
- 60% reduction in page load time
- 25% increase in average order value

## Timeline
August 2024 - December 2024

## Team Size
5 engineers, 2 designers, 1 PM
